# @kubernetes-models/cloudnative-pg

## 2.0.0

### Major Changes

- [#269](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/pull/269) [`264c76e`](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/commit/264c76ea5382871e7a925e7992c3c07493b52b29) Thanks [@tommy351](https://github.com/tommy351)! - Migrate from crd-generate to go-generate.

### Patch Changes

- [`211b982`](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/commit/211b9824d8d4ccfd7e42bfea7522faa4a6b59dcb) Thanks [@tommy351](https://github.com/tommy351)! - Bump version to avoid using deprecated dependencies.

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- [#255](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/pull/255) [`d4280f7`](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/commit/d4280f7f316ac9c149a06c364e8d5d941e23ade1) Thanks [@tommy351](https://github.com/tommy351)! - Require Node.js 22+.
